title: One trigger may use auxdata belonging to another.
key_bug_features: REGEXP operators in triggers using incorrect auxdata
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a TEXT, b INTEGER, c REAL, d BLOB);
CREATE TABLE x1(x INTEGER, y INTEGER, z INTEGER, w TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TRIGGER tr1 AFTER INSERT ON t1 BEGIN INSERT INTO x1 VALUES(new.a REGEXP 'abc', new.b REGEXP 'abc', new.c REGEXP 'abc', new.d);
CREATE TRIGGER tr2 AFTER INSERT ON t1 BEGIN INSERT INTO x1 VALUES(new.a REGEXP 'def', new.b REGEXP 'def', new.c REGEXP 'def', NULL);
